falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes above 5600 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 79% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug is invalidated because the August 2024 bottom was followed by a sustained rally from ~5300, not a break to new highs within 2 weeks; this would indicate a V-bottom recovery rather than the expected consolidation/base-building phase

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 14.00 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The BLOWOFF SCORE of 38 suggests elevated volatility/uncertainty; sustained VIX sub-14 would indicate complacency return and invalidate the stress-state signal that supports the current HOLD verdict

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% while SPX simultaneously trades above 5450
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal a goldilocks/risk-on reflation narrative inconsistent with the bottom_2024_aug analog, which featured yields rising ~40bps from trough as equities stabilized; the pattern requires rates-stocks correlation to hold for validity

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
